title: cyperus helvus
intro: Cyperus helvus, also known as the Yellow Papyrus or Yellow Sedge, is a perennial aquatic plant species that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus helvus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues, as well as promoting wound healing and skin health. In herbal preparations, Cyperus helvus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional remedies for treating various ailments.
